resources.string: The SMS passcode you’ve entered is incorrect
A new app update is available
You are about to take a level completion test. If you pass it successfully, you will earn an official Busuu certificate.
Your report has been sent to our Customer Service team.
Access your exclusive invite and start learning now.
To resume access make sure your payment details are up to date.
"%1$s! There's a billing issue with your account. We've temporarily paused your access to Premium. Let's fix it now and get you back on track."
Achieve your goals faster with a personalised Study Plan that fits around your life
Get unlimited, ad-free access to all lessons
Tired of interruptions? Remove ads and learn %1$s faster with Busuu Premium.
Tired of interruptions? Remove ads and learn a language faster with Busuu Premium.
Watch an ad or start a free trial to unlock lesson
Watch a short video to unlock your next free %s lesson.
To add words to your Favorites list, press the star button on a word in your vocabulary list or on a flashcard.
Adding a new language requires a Premium membership
Add more details about the issue you have experienced here.
Add study reminders to my calendar
After that you can continue to invite your friends
A huge choice of everyday situations to practise.
Personalised feedback plus all Premium Plus tools!
Upgrade to Busuu Premium Plus and get…
Describe what you want to practice speaking, and we’ll create the scenario
Did this scenario support your learning goal?
Please try recording your reply again.

"Our automated, AI-powered features personalise your learning experience.
If you use our Speaking practice and AI Conversations features, your voice will be recorded and saved. This allows the AI to improve and give you tailored feedback. Your voice won’t be used to uniquely identify you. Learn more in our Privacy Policy."
Build speaking fluency for real-life scenarios with AI Conversations.
Welcome to Conversations! Try this lesson for free
Already have an account? Log in
It looks like you already have a subscription
Please press \"Continue\" if you choose to start using our app.
Enable the Creative Debugger SDK settings in order to view recent ads.
Displays more info about the list item.
To use %s you must agree to our Terms & Conditions and affirm you have reviewed our Privacy Policy
To use %s you must affirm that you have reviewed and acknowledged our Privacy Policy.
Are you sure you want to leave the test?
"As you learn, you'll see all the vocabulary here. And with our personalised smart Review our quizzes will ensure you never forget."
This link has expired or is invalid, please log in using your login details or reset your password.
Was this correction the most helpful? Tap here to award \"Best Correction\"
Bite-sized lessons perfect for everyday life, work and travel
Book a 30 minute 1:1 Live Lesson with a professional tutor
Bring the joy of languages to others
Build the habit of a lifetime!
Build pronunciation confidence by unlocking all lessons with Premium.
We’re building the leagues for a new week of learning. Come back soon.
I obtained the Busuu %1$s %2$s completion certificate on #Busuu
Automatic renewal, you can cancel anytime through the Play Store
Subscription renews automatically. Cancel anytime through your PayPal account.
Your Premium Plus access will end on %1$s
Cancellation successful. Your Premium Plus access will end on %1$s
Are you sure you want to cancel?
Speaking another language can give you great opportunities!
Personalised courses tailored to your needs.
Your Premium access will end on %1$s
We were unable to cancel your subscription. Please try again.
Cancellation successful. Your Premium access will end on %1$s
"Here's everything you can do with Premium"
You can find answers to all your questions in our help centre.
"If you cancel you won't be able to access your exercises and locked content."
"We're sorry you're leaving. Can you tell us why?"
Get notified %s days before your trial ends.
We’ll send a notification %s days before your trial ends.
"To cancel, please select Busuu on the next screen and confirm your cancellation there. You'll still have access to your subscription until %1$s."
"Can't find a %s speaking buddy? You might already have one. Refer a friend today."
Subscription is being processed, your Premium membership will be activated shortly
You scored %1$d out of %2$d and earned a %3$s completion certificate. Your certificate has been emailed to you. You can also save it as a PDF.
You scored %1$d out of %2$d and earned a %3$s completion certificate. Your certificate will be emailed to you.
"You scored %1$d out of %2$d and unfortunately didn't pass the test this time, feel free to retry or go back to practice more. You can retake this test in two weeks and improve your score."
Change the course to Complete course to access speaking practice.
Score %1$d%% or above to complete this checkpoint
Busuu recommends that you update to the latest version.
Please use at least six characters for your password
Choose the phrase that matches the audio
Choose the phrase that matches the image
Choose the picture you want to talk or write about
Choose the language you’d like to learn
This offer is only available in the Busuu app. Click the invite link on your phone and go to the App Store to claim your free trial.
"Cannot establish network connection. Please try again later."
"We have no updates. Please check again later."
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
"You're in control - choose what info you want to share with apps."
Come back tomorrow for your next free daily lesson
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
"We're sorry. There are no exercises to correct for the languages you speak."
"You have no exercises corrected. Complete a conversation exercise to start receiving corrections!"
Complete a Community exercise and get feedback from our fluent speakers
Complete an exercise by writing or speaking and get corrected by native speakers
Congratulations on your first friend request!
"We'll connect you with some of our 80 million learners. Get feedback and help others learn too!"
We have just updated your content to make it even better! Please download the update to continue learning with Busuu.
Tap the download button above to start.
"We couldn't download your update. This can happen if you lost the connection to the Internet."
Please check your internet connection and tap the download button above to try again.
"Woohoo! Your content has been updated. You can now enjoy Busuu's most up-to-date lessons."
Continue learning or help more people
Write in the box or record yourself speaking.
"You'll be notified when someone gives you feedback."
Correct as many exercises as you can
"You've helped %s learners get one step closer to their goals. Give yourself a pat on the back - you deserve it!"
Invalid content has been detected. Please do not post domain names.
e.g. Alexandra has corrected your exercise
e.g. Alexandra has asked you to correct their conversation exercise
Tap on the text to correct it
You reached the limit of corrections or friend requests. Please try again later.
%s is your superpower! learn a new language or keep skills fresh by practising in the community
"You've reached the end of %s. Test your skills and prove how far you've come with a Busuu Certificate."
"Wow you're so close. It's time to take the final test and complete your %s"
Take the test again in %d days.
Take the test again in %d days.
Take the test again in %d day.
Take the test again in %d days.
Take the test again in %d days.
Take the test again in %d days
Test your skills to access the next chapter
Want to learn faster? Upgrade to Premium to unlock now.
Complete all lessons above to unlock
Create a free account to start learning %1$s
Create a personalised Study Plan to hit your goals and stay motivated. Learn fast.
You already have an active Study Plan for %1$s. Creating a new Study Plan for %2$s will delete your existing one.
Just %1$d stars needed to reach your daily goal
You are %1$d stars away from completing your daily goal
Well done, %1$s.You completed your daily goal.
"You're flying through our lessons! Here's 50%% off Busuu Premium. Available for 24 hours."
Are you sure you want to delete your account?
This can’t be undone and will be removed from this Conversation, together with any related comments.
This can’t be undone and will be removed from your exercises, together with any related corrections and comments.

"I was created to give feedback on exercises while waiting for human correction.
Don’t forget to let me know how I did today. I’m not perfect yet, but with your help I’ll improve!"

"I’m here to ensure you get feedback on your exercises. While waiting for human feedback, I’ve stepped in to give you a correction.
I’m not perfect yet, but with your help I’ll improve!"
Listen to the dialogue and fill in the gaps.
Please enter the 4-digit code sent to you at +%s. Did you enter the correct mobile number?
%1$d%% off your first year of Busuu Premium
"We would love to help you learn, so here's %1$d%% off if you upgrade in the next hour"
Discover what you can do with Premium Plus:
Do you already know your level?
Do you only need access to the lessons?
Are you sure you want to quit?
"Don't lose access to your Premium membership and renew now."
Download all lessons for unlimited use, anywhere, anytime
Download all lessons to learn on the go
Download all lessons with Offline Mode
Download all lessons for offline use
Each friend can then sign up to Busuu using your link, and start their 30-day free trial.
Each friend can then sign up to Busuu using your link, and start their 30-day free trial. (They will need to start their free trial within 14 days of signing up or you won’t get your reward).
"Free up storage space on your device; your lesson progress won't be lost."
Build the foundations for your future
Access to all lessons and international media content
Improve fast with a smart Vocabulary Review
Achieve your goals with a personalised Study Plan
Meet and get corrected by native speakers
22 hours of Busuu Premium = 1 college semester of language study
University study proves that 22 hours of Busuu Premium are equivalent to a college semester
The research team, led by Roumen Vesselinov, PhD, from City University New York who has conducted similar studies with other apps mentioned:
\"Among all the language learning apps studied so far, the efficacy of Busuu is the best.\"
In 2016, we conducted a university study with a research team from City University of New York & the University of South Carolina to measure the learning outcomes of our product.
The independent research team followed a group of 144 Busuu students who studied Spanish using only our platform over a period of 2 months.

The participants had full access to our Premium membership, including voice recordings, grammar units, pdfs, vocab trainer etc. The students had to take a standardized written and oral entry test at the beginning of the study as well as an exit test so the researchers could measure the average learning improvements over the 2 months.
The results have been amazing as Busuu came out as the most efficient language learning tool ever studied so far!

Our team of language experts work tirelessly to create the best learning experiences for you, including comprehensive grammar and vocabulary tips plus exercises to help you develop four key skills: reading, writing, listening and speaking. Our proven features include a Vocabulary Trainer, pronunciation exercises and writing lessons.
Language learning with Busuu - it works!
• 84%% of participants who sat the written test improved their result.
• 75%% of participants who sat the oral test improved their result by one level or more.
• Of those who studied for 16 hours or more on Busuu, 100%% made a significant improvement to either their written test result, oral test result or both.
• Busuu users only need to study an average of 22 hours over two months to cover the requirements for one college semester of Spanish.
• 100%% of those who answered the exit survey said that they would continue to use Busuu after the study ended.
Did you know: 22 hours of Busuu Premium = 1 college semester of language study

When you join Busuu you join a community of language learners from all over the world. The most effective language learners are those who practice most and help each other to improve. Send off your exercises to native speakers and get corrections back, fast!
By enabling private mode, you choose not to receive friend requests from other users
Enhance your skills using our Vocabulary Trainer
failed to fetch OT banner data
Pass valid parameters to get the data
Pass a valid ISO Language code to get the data
Max number of profiles already created. Please delete one of the profiles to be able to add a new one.
"Oops, looks like there's a connection issue. Please wait a few seconds and try again."
"Oops, looks like there's a connection issue. Please wait a few seconds and try again."
An error occurred when communicating with Facebook
Sign in with Google is not available.
"Sorry, we don't recognize this phone number or email address. Please check and retry."
Sign in to use this app
"Oops, looks like you're offline. Please reconnect and try again"
There is an existing account associated with this email address or phone number. Please log in or use different details to sign up.
"Oops, looks like there's a connection issue. Please wait a few seconds and try again."
There was an error uploading your picture. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
Sorry, something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
Your exercise has been sent to be corrected by %s speakers.
Tap the menu to display more options
Your exercise has been sent to the community for correction, now get more corrections by friending %s speakers.
Drag and drop to the right translation
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
Failed to obtain your login details, please try again.
Hello %s! This is your first notification. Check here for news on your account activity.
Listen and select the correct word(s) to fill the gap.
Select the correct word(s) to fill the gap.
Select the correct words to fill the gaps.
Fill in the gap using the audio.
Fill in the gap using the image.
Fill in the gap using the hint.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
Finding it hard to learn alone? Our community is here to help.
Finish all above lessons or upgrade to Premium to unlock now.
You did it! You finished your first %1$s lesson. How great does it feel?
Earn stars by completing activities and compete in the Leagues.
Read and listen to the word(s).
Read and listen to the word(s) and key phrase.
Follow our bite-sized lessons with content designed to help you achieve your goal.
For every invited friend who starts a free trial, you’ll both get 30 days of Premium Plus.
You must supply a valid email
The password has to be %s characters long
Upgrade to Premium now and unlock all these features. Ends soon!
Try Busuu Premium FREE for 7 days and learn faster!
We will send you a push notification reminder before your trial ends.
"Don't miss out! Try Busuu Premium free for 7 days. Offer ends in 2 hours! ⏱️"
Last chance to try the full %s course for FREE
Premium %s learners are %sx more likely to stay on target
Try all of Busuu free for %s days, then %s/year (%s/mo). Cancel anytime.
We will notify you that your trial is ending. Cancel anytime in 30 seconds.
Unlock the full %s course and access all lessons.
Last chance to try Premium Plus for free
Automatic renewal. Cancel anytime through your PayPal account.
Automatic renewal. Cancel anytime through the Play Store.
e.g. Alexandra has sent you a friend request
Friend requests are on the way
Access all lessons and interactive video content
A technical error has occurred, please try again.
Get a free year of Premium Plus
"Get access to all content, earn official certificates, use when you're offline, plus loads more"
Get access to all content, create a Study Plan, use offline, plus loads more.
Get access to all content on Busuu and learn multiple languages
Get access to fun quizzes and exercises
Get corrected by native speakers in return
Get feedback and improve your pronunciation
Get fluent in half the time!
Get full access to 12 different language courses
Get reminders for when your free daily lessons are ready
Get unlimited access to our full lesson content
Sign up for Busuu updates, exclusive offers and learning tips!
Give a 30-day guest pass to 5 friends
They can give you feedback and you can learn a language together!
Give some praise or suggest an improvement.
Give yourself a pat on the back and get speaking with other %s speakers.
Go Premium Plus to start your Study Plan!
Go Premium to start your Study Plan
Go to detail about the category
Please download and enable the Google app to complete speech recognition exercises.

"Don't just learn a language, fall in love with it! Your language learning couldn't be more fun and easy than with Busuu. Learn French, English, Spanish, Russian, Chinese and 7 other languages with the help of over 90 million people worldwide that use Busuu. Rated by Google as a “Must have app” for Android, Busuu's language learning app is the quickest and best way to learn a new language in just a few minutes a day, so download it right away."
Learn French, Spanish and more languages - Busuu
"Please enable Google Voice Typing in your phone's Settings to complete speech recognition exercises."
"Hi, %1$s! There's a billing issue with your account. Fix it now so you don't lose Premium access."
"Understand how to put the words you've learned to good use"
Put the words in the correct order to form a sentence
"Build essential skills with Grammar Review. "Tap here to upgrade for unlimited access.
Build your grammar skills with unlimited practice. Only with Premium
You’ve used up your free access
Your tips can be found here
Complete the text using the information in the box
Which languages would you like to help people with? Please select the languages you speak
Be the first to give feedback
Help %s learners by correcting their exercises
Which languages would you like to help people with?
Help learners by correcting their exercises
Make new friends by correcting their conversation exercises
Users across the world are learning %s
Help them by correcting their exercises
Get feedback on your own conversation exercises in return and make new friends
Add them as friends so you can keep in touch and exchange your work
"Here's a link if you want to check it out: %s"
Here’s what you can do with it
Hold to record your answer in %s
Hold the button to record your correction
How long would you like to study for?
How would you like to complete this exercise?
I love how easy it is to use, and how amazing the community is. The lessons are designed very well and the app is extremely easy to use.
"I did it! I reached my %1$s learning goal. If you want to succeed at learning a language too, try Busuu; it's comprehensive, it's fun and it worked for me! %2$s"
If you cancel your Premium membership, you will no longer have access to Premium features once your subscription expires
They use native, non-robotic speakers and speak at a natural pace so you can hear the linking of words.
Improve your speaking or writing skills and get instant feedback from native speakers in the Busuu Community
It’ll get easier. Let’s move on.
Let’s move on from this for now.
Don’t worry - let’s skip this for now.
Improve your language skills with Live Lessons
Go to your device’s settings to enable the app to use your location in the background
Allow access to your location all the time
Please allow access to storage to see your photos
Your Android app is now integrated with the Intercom platform
Our bot can answer many common questions
"To allow access, go to your device app settings' permissions menu"
"We couldn't find any GIFs matching your query"
There are no photos on this device
Contain links to take an action in this app
Reply notifications from chats in this app
New chat messages sent from this app
You denied access to your photos
Sorry, we couldn’t find any results for that. Try rewording your search.
Some things failed to load. Try again.
To see your photos you need to allow access to storage
Please select all options that apply
Please enter a valid email address
This question requires at least {response_count} options to be selected
This question requires {response_count} options to be selected
Please select a minimum of {minimum_response_count} and a maximum of {maximum_response_count} options
Please keep answers to a maximum of {character_count} characters
Please ensure answers have a minimum of {character_count} characters
Please enter a valid telephone number
{app_name} typically replies in one business day
{app_name} typically replies in two business days
Tell us what you need help with and our bot will do its best to answer
Thanks! The team will reply in one business day
Thanks! The team will reply in two business days
Thanks! The team will reply as soon as they can
"That country code doesn't look quite right"
That number has too many digits
That number is missing a few digits
That number needs a prefix (+ or 00)
The team can help if needed
The team typically replies in a few hours.
The team typically replies in one business day.
The team typically replies in two business days
Try different keywords or type your full question
Typically replies in one business day
Typically replies in two business days
You can return here anytime to see responses and send updates.
Share some context to help the team respond better and faster.
Thanks for sending that context. To save time later, feel free to add more details now.
An interface in %s is currently not available for this course. Please change your interface language in Settings.

Invite your friends. Study free for a year.

Lucky you! We found %s speakers, add them as friends to get more corrections and help each other learn.

"Make sure you never forget the words you've learned"
Make sure you have a good internet connection.
Make sure you can hear the audio clearly.

We only display exercises your friends have completed from the last two weeks.

"You don't have any friends yet. Make friends by helping others and correcting their conversation exercises."
No matter the language you are learning, it teaches you actual grammar concepts and how to use them, which I find remarkable.

"No thanks, I don't need a Study Plan"

that fit your schedule

Not updating data as the data received from server is same
Data Retention | if applicable value displayed in days

"Cancel my subscription
You can easily manage your subscription via %1$s"
Others will see your picture on your profile, comments and conversation exercises.
Profile already active, not downloading the data/not parsing the data again.
Switch profile not supported without SDK initialized.
Our community is here to help you stay motivated and achieve your goals.
Practise what you’ve learned and get corrected by native speakers
Learn to build sentences with advanced grammar units

Download all lessons for unlimited use, anytime, anywhere
Test your knowledge with fun quizzes

To resume access to all features go to Google Play now.
You’ll lose your %s-day streak forever unless you repair it now.
Access speaking practice & gain confidence with accurate feedback
You completed your first lesson! Here’s a year of Busuu Premium for just %s %s so you can improve faster.
Please try restoring your purchase, or contact our support team: team@busuu.com
Please check your connection and try again later.
Please check your payment details are correct and that your Play Store app is up-to-date.
We were unable to connect to the Play Store. Your card has not been charged.
There is already a Busuu subscription associated with your Google Play account.
You purchase was successful, but the Play Store is no longer responding.
This is your last chance to claim this one-time offer.
6 and 12-month Premium plans come with a 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime with ease.
All transactions are secure and encrypted.
Get %s%% off Premium and watch your %s skills take off!
To reward your hard work, get a year of Premium for just %s %s and grow your %s skills faster.
Claim your gift: Get %s%% off Premium
You completed your first lesson! Here’s a %s-day free trial of Busuu Premium so you can improve faster.
Practise with native speakers & feel ready for real-world interactions.
Stay focused on achieving language goals without disruptions.
Prove your progress and add level completion certificates to your CV.
Sharpen your key skills with access to exclusive courses.

Repair your streak automatically if you miss a day.
Choose your lessons for personalised learning.

You currently have no active subscription

Go to amazon.com. Check if you’re signed in to the correct Amazon Account. Go to your Account page. Click on Other Subscriptions in the Memberships and subscriptions section Select the subscription you want to cancel. Then Cancel Subscription.
Open the Settings app. Tap your name. Tap Subscriptions. Tap the subscription that you want to manage. Tap Cancel Subscription.

Go to play.google.com. Check if you’re signed in to the correct Google Account. On the left, click My subscriptions. Select the subscription you want to cancel. Click Manage and then Cancel Subscription.

Speak like a local with feedback from native speakers

"Our automated, AI-powered features personalise your learning experience.
If you use our Speaking practice or AI Conversations features, your voice will be recorded and saved. This allows the AI to improve and give you tailored feedback. Your voice won’t be used to uniquely identify you. Learn more in our Privacy Policy."
Repeat what you’ve learned so far and get AI-generated pronunciation feedback.

What is your main goal in learning %1$s?
Feel like a local when I travel
Ask and answer easy questions and introduce myself to other people
Introduce myself and ask simple questions
Order a meal in a restaurant and understand signs
Ask and answer easy questions and introduce myself to new colleagues
Take part in simple conversations and talk about my studies
Take part in simple conversations and describe my friends and family
Impress my friends by socialising in %1$s
Make small talk with locals and talk about my life
Take part in simple conversations and talk about my job
Talk about my favourite bands, movies, food and TV shows
Find my way around on my own
Understand the main points of a presentation and give my opinion
Understand the majority of a lecture and write essays
Take an active part in discussions
Understand most of a movie or TV programme
Understand most things, write reports and take part in discussions
Express myself in writing using different styles
Express myself fluently on a variety of challenging contemporary topics
Understand films, novels and long articles on complex topics
Understand extended speech and be familiar with idioms
Present clear arguments and describe trends in data
What level do you want to achieve?
Research shows that studying at the same time each day helps form habits.
When would you like to learn?
